raw_abstract: In this essay, I argue that the ludification of culture should be considered as an overall failure. The effects of (digital) play in culture and society have been largely negative, a fact that game studies and media studies have only partially assumed. While there are many positive aspects to play and games in society, it may be time to rethink the importance we give to the ludic in information societies.
abstract_en: In this essay, I argue that the ludification of culture should be considered as an overall failure. The effects of (digital) play in culture and society have been largely negative, a fact that game studies and media studies have only partially assumed. While there are many positive aspects to play and games in society, it may be time to rethink the importance we give to the ludic in information societies.
abstract_zh: 在这篇文章中，我认为文化的游戏化应被视为整体上的失败。游戏（尤其是数字游戏）在文化和社会中的影响大多是负面的，这一事实游戏研究和媒体研究仅部分承认。尽管游戏在社会中有许多积极方面，但或许是时候重新思考我们在信息社会中赋予游戏的重要性了。
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章认为，将文化变得像游戏一样（游戏化）总体上是不成功的。作者指出，数字游戏对社会和文化的影响主要是负面的，尽管游戏也有好处。文章建议我们应该重新考虑游戏在现代社会中的重要性。
plain_summary_en: This article argues that making culture more game-like (ludification) has mostly failed. The author states that digital games have had mainly negative effects on society and culture, even though games also have benefits. The article suggests we should reconsider how important games are in modern society.
research_direction_zh: 批判性分析数字游戏和文化游戏化对社会的影响，重新评估游戏在信息社会中的角色。
research_direction_en: Critically analyzing the impact of digital games and cultural ludification on society, and reassessing the role of play in information societies.
